title: TimberReplant
description: Automatically fell entire trees and replant saplings with one block break! Sustainable forestry made easy with configurable settings and proper tool durability.
body:
# 🌲 TimberReplant

**✨ Revolutionize tree harvesting in Minecraft with efficiency, sustainability, and automation. ✨**

TimberReplant makes wood gathering smarter: fell entire trees with a single block break and automatically replant saplings to keep your world green . Perfect for players who want **efficiency without harming the environment**.

***

## 🌳 Key Features

### 🔍 Intelligent Tree Detection

*   Detects **complete tree structures** from any log block
*   Supports all vanilla tree types: Oak, Birch, Spruce, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Cherry, Mangrove
*   Configurable **detection radius** and **maximum tree size** for optimal performance

### ⚡ Automated Harvesting

*   Break **one log → entire tree falls**
*   Preserves all standard drops: logs, leaves, sticks, saplings
*   Compatible with **vanilla drop rates and enchantments**

### 🌱 Sustainable Replanting

*   Automatically plants the correct **sapling type** at the tree’s base
*   Intelligent **ground validation** ensures successful planting
*   Drops the sapling as an item if conditions are unsuitable

### 🛠 Tool Integration

*   Realistic **durability consumption** based on harvested logs
*   Respects **tool effectiveness and enchantments**
*   Optional **tool requirement enforcement** configurable in settings

***

## ⚙️ Technical Specifications

### 🚀 Performance Optimization

*   Efficient **breadth-first search algorithm** with configurable limits
*   **Server-side processing** with client sync
*   Memory-conscious design prevents lag in large forests

### 📝 Configuration System

Customize via `timberreplant-common.toml`:

*   **Tree Felling**: Enable/disable automatic harvesting
*   **Replanting**: Toggle sapling auto-placement
*   **Detection Limits**: Max tree size & search radius
*   **Tool Requirements**: Enforce tool usage
*   **Durability System**: Control tool wear
*   **Audio Effects**: Configure harvesting sounds
*   **Leaf Processing**: Include/exclude leaf collection

***

## 💡 Use Cases

*   **Survival Players**: Efficient resource gathering while preserving nature
*   **Builders**: Quickly collect wood for construction projects
*   **Server Administrators**: Reduce deforestation with auto-replanting
*   **Modpack Creators**: Enhance gameplay flow without breaking vanilla balance

***

## 📦 Installation Requirements

*   Install on **server**

***

## 💬 Support & Community

For technical support, feature requests, or community discussion, join our Discord:
